policy: retrieve structured subject refs first, then lexical query matches; partition into reports, memories, beliefs, publicRecords
guard: do not dump full history into actor frame

policy: execute deterministic reserved/same-scope continuations; defer non-deterministic due work as versioned proposals
guard: no hidden detached backend mutation after player-visible done

budget: rebuild only after deterministic pre-narrator catch-up
policy: preserve oracle/combat info while refreshing scene facts after offscreen state changes
guard: narrator sees settled authoritative state, not stale pre-catch-up frame

policy: reject narration source, stock prose, and unanchored flavor; keep claim/report/rumor epistemic status
guard: backend ledger stores provenance without promoting model claims to truth
